---
title: "Teaching"
---

I am committed to accessible and relevant education in quantitative methods for social science research. My teaching practices emphasize critical thinking and knowledge appropriation among students.

::: {.section-title}
Courses Taught
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [Course Name]
**[Role: Instructor of Record / Teaching Assistant]** · [University] · [Semester, Year]

[Brief description: What is the course about? Who is the audience — undergrad/grad? 
What skills or ideas do students leave with?]

::: {.tag}
Undergraduate
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [Course Name]
**[Role]** · [University] · [Semester, Year]

[Brief description.]

::: {.tag}
Graduate
:::
:::

::: {.section-title}
Teaching Philosophy
:::

[2–3 sentences describing your approach to teaching. What do you believe about 
how students learn? What do you prioritize in the classroom?]

> *"[An optional quote that captures your teaching values — your own or one you 
> find inspiring.]*"

::: {.section-title}
Materials & Resources
:::

I make syllabi and selected course materials available below.

- [Course Name] ([Semester Year]) — [<a href="#">Syllabus PDF</a>]
- [Course Name] ([Semester Year]) — [<a href="#">Syllabus PDF</a>]
